## Patient dosing summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|

## Quick assessment

- Current dosing parameters appear internally consistent across all three compassionate-use patients.
- No obvious anomalies are present in the dosing configuration file.
- Based on the config alone, CU-001 and CU-002 appear clinically stable, and CU-003 is on an expected early-treatment schedule.
- **Important limitation:** this file does not provide live PK model status or runtime validation outputs, so it cannot confirm real-time model stability on its own.

- From the **dosing config**, everything looks **internally consistent**.
